channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Matt Gaetz is dishing out career advice on Cameo
item.description: After announcing he would not return to Congress, Matt Gaetz is trying out a new career path: making personalized videos on Cameo.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Taking stock of human capital in the age of AI
item.description: Turnover has always been a concern for employers, but in a recent PwC report, an increasing number of employees worldwide are looking to move within the next year in light of many things, but mostly because of opportunities afforded by the rapid pace of technological change.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Federal prosecutors seek records from company that deployed AI weapons scanner on NYC subway
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Federal investigators in New York are seeking records from the manufacturer of an AI-powered weapons scanner that was briefly deployed this summer in New York City’s subway system.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Influencer houses are dead. Welcome to the production studio era
item.description: Influencers today look a lot more like Hollywood executives than ragtag social media users. And they’re buying up the real estate to prove it. A slew of creators have been buying plots of studio land to film and edit their content.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Biden administration preliminarily OKs $6.6B loan to EV maker Rivian
item.description: The Biden administration has preliminarily said it would give a $6.6 billion loan to electric vehicle (EV) maker Rivian for a plant in Georgia.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, The Hill

item.title: Revolutionizing HR and payroll: Strategies for a modern workforce
item.description: Learn how agencies are innovating their payroll services to meet evolving needs The post Revolutionizing HR and payroll: Strategies for a modern workforce first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Implementing Zero Trust: Strategies for Securing IT and OT
item.description: Expert insights on implementing zero trust principles, securing IT and operational technology, and addressing workforce challenges in the federal sector.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Interpol clamps down on cybercrime and arrests over 1,000 suspects in Africa
item.description: DAKAR, Senegal (AP) — Interpol arrested 1,006 suspects in Africa during a massive two-month operation, clamping down on cybercrime that left tens of thousands of victims, including some who were trafficked, and produced millions in financial damages, the global police organization said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: MARK BANCHEREAU, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Apple Awards Finalists: A Showcase of Innovation and Excellence
item.description: Discover the Apple Design Award, TV App of the Year, Game of the Year, and more finalists from across various categories.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Mulvaney calls DOGE a 'PR campaign,' but respects Musk, Ramaswamy's attempt to reform government
item.description: Former White House chief of staff Mick Mulvaney called the inaugural Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) a “PR campaign,” in a Monday interview, but said he respects the efforts by its appointed leaders, Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy, to reform the federal government.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: USPTO petitioned to cancel Oracle’s JavaScript trademark
item.description: Deno Land, maker of the Deno runtime for JavaScript, has petitioned the United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) to cancel Oracle’s ownership of the JavaScript trademark.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google, DOJ wrap up second antitrust trial
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) and Google wrapped up the tech giant’s second antitrust trial in two years Monday, as the company seeks to fend off monopoly allegations in the advertising technology space. After a relatively brief two-week trial in September, the two sides reconvened in U.S.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Is Outlook down? Thousands of Microsoft 365 users report outage issues
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Thousands of Microsoft 365 customers worldwide reported having issues with services like Outlook and Teams on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Intel’s CHIPS Act grant reduced as production delays and losses mount
item.description: The US government has scaled back Intel’s preliminary CHIPS Act grant from $8.5 billion to under $8 billion, reflecting concerns over the company’s delayed investments and financial woes, The New York Times reported.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Red Hat Linux to be official WSL distro
item.description: Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL) is set to become an official Linux distribution for Microsoft’s Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL), a Windows feature that allows users to run Linux environments on Windows without a separate virtual machine.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI networking a focus of HPE’s Juniper deal as Justice Department concerns swirl
item.description: Amid reports of US regulatory concerns over HPE’s proposed buy of Juniper Networks, the CEOs of both companies talked about the future of the blended entity at this week’s HPE Discover event in Barcelona – and that future includes plenty of AI networking technology.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to protect your deliveries from getting stolen by porch pirates
item.description: Porch pirates are on the prowl this holiday season. Tech guru Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson has a number of tips to prevent holiday package thefts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
